title: RestoreResult
description: Schema for the dict returned by restore_from_backup() / restore(). Transient communication — no embedded schema_namespace/schema_version. DESIGN_RESTORE_OPS.md.

ok.description: Whether the restore operation succeeded overall.

deleted.description: Entries deleted during restore-related cleanup operations.

skipped.description: Entries that were skipped (e.g. hash match when force=false).

orphans.description: Orphaned files found in the backup directory that are not in the current mapping scope.

errors.description: Fatal error messages. Each string begins with an E_ code.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warning messages. Each string begins with a W_ code.

force.description: Whether force mode was used (skip hash verification).
